heading: Computation of retired pay: computation of years of service
label: 12733 Computation of retired pay: computation of years of service
notes: Historical and Revision Notes1956ActRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)133310:1036b (less 1st 91 words, and less 1st proviso).10:1036e(c) (as applicable to determination of retired pay).10:1036e(d) (as applicable to determination of retired pay).34:440j (less 1st 91 words, and less 1st proviso)., §§ 303 (less 1st 91 words, and less 1st proviso), 306 ((c) and (d), as applicable to determination of retired pay), ; , .June 29, 1948, ch. 70862 Stat. 1088–1090Sept. 7, 1949, ch. 547, § 363 Stat. 69334:440m(c) (as applicable to determination of retired pay).34:440m(d) (as applicable to determination of retired pay).The revised section consolidates provisions of 10:1036b and 1036e, and 34:440j and 440m, relating to the years of service that may be counted in determining retired pay for persons entitled to that pay under this chapter.Clause (1) is substituted for 10:1036b(i). In clause (3), the words “and proportionately for each fraction of a year” are inserted to make clear that parts of years must be counted. 10:1036e(d) and 34:440m(d) are omitted as covered by sections 101(22) and 101(24) of this title.

1958ActThe change is necessary so that active service and service described in section 1332(a)(2)(A)(ii) that was performed on or before , may be counted in computing retired pay, as provided by the source law, section 303(i) of the Army and Air Force Vitalization and Retirement Equalization Act of 1948 () and in accordance with the opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Army (JAGA 1956/1908, ).July 1, 1949Feb. 13, 195662 Stat. 1088

children.text: The person’s days of active service.

The person’s days of full-time service under sections 316, 502, 503, 504, and 505 of title 32 while performing annual training duty or while attending a prescribed course of instruction at a school designated as a service school by law or by the Secretary concerned.

children.label: A
children.text: 60 days in any one year of service before the year of service that includes ;September 23, 1996

children.label: B
children.text: 75 days in the year of service that includes , and in any subsequent year of service before the year of service that includes ;September 23, 1996October 30, 2000

children.label: C
children.text: 90 days in the year of service that includes , and in any subsequent year of service before the year of service that includes ; andOctober 30, 2000October 30, 2007

children.label: D
children.text: 130 days in the year of service that includes , and in any subsequent year of service.October 30, 2007
One day for each point credited to the person under subparagraph (E) of .section 12732(a)(2) of this title
One day for each point credited to the person under subparagraph (F) of .section 12732(a)(2) of this title

50 days for each year before , and proportionately for each fraction of a year, of service (other than active service) in a reserve component of an armed force, in the Army or the Air Force without component, or in any other category covered by , except a regular component.July 1, 1949section 12732(a)(1) of this title
